Game.Name: Super Gussun Oyoyo (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Gussun Oyoyo is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Kan's and published by Banpresto,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Unlock Omake Mode in the Options menuTo unlock the Omake mode, you must finish the game on any difficulty. Once you have completed the game, go to the Options mode and a new fifth mode can be seen above the exit option. Entering the Omake mode allows you to choose between two characters; Emily and George. You cannot choose George during the first playthrough, but completing the game while choosing him allows you to see a different ending as well as see Emily in a different outfit when you select which stage to start on during the main game.
